untranslatable_reason: Pairs trading strategy requires: (1) statistical identification of cointegrated stock pairs, (2) calculation of spread stationarity (ADF test, Hurst exponent, half-life of mean reversion), (3) dynamic hedge ratios, and (4) spread z-score monitoring. These require multi-asset correlation analysis, cointegration tests, and spread calculation across two symbols—none of which are supported by single-symbol technical indicators in the allowed list. The signal also specifies critical parameters (lookback_period, threshold, half_life, backtest_sharpe, backtest_period) as AUTHOR_SILENT, making rule construction impossible.
translation_notes: This is a statistical arbitrage / pairs trading strategy that operates at the portfolio level (long stock A, short stock B simultaneously). It cannot be expressed as single-symbol technical indicator conditions. Requires: (1) pairs selection engine with cointegration detection, (2) spread calculation and stationarity testing, (3) position sizing based on hedge ratios, and (4) spread mean-reversion signals. Recommend implementing as separate pairs trading module outside standard backtest engine.
